host.name: Yohann Calpu
host.credentials: Nine years podcasting across five shows. Ex-IBM, ex-JP Morgan, ex-Ontario Government. Co-founder of Aloomii. Formally trained software engineer.

publisher_identity.editorial_frame: Conversations with operators, founders, and investors working at the frontier of AI, space, physics, and emerging technology. The recurring reference point is Carl Sagan's pale blue dot: everything discussed happens here, on Earth, while the surrounding technology changes.

capabilities.semantic_description: Pale Blue Nexus is a long-form interview podcast hosted by Yohann Calpu. Each episode is a pre-recorded one-on-one conversation, typically 30 to 60 minutes, with a single guest who is an operator, founder, or investor working in artificial intelligence, space, physics, or emerging technology. Episodes are published as full-length video on YouTube and as audio on Apple Podcasts, Spotify, and iHeart. The show publishes on an irregular schedule. It is not daily and not a fixed weekly release. Each episode covers the guest's work, decisions, and views on technology and its effects on people.
capabilities.audience_profile: Operators, founders, investors, and technically curious listeners interested in AI, space, physics, and emerging technology.

published_episodes.title: What a Legendary Investor Told Me After 17 Years
published_episodes.guest_role: Legendary investor. Co-founder of the Quantum Fund with George Soros, which returned 4,200 percent.

published_episodes.title: Why Sales Is Dead and Podcasts Build Trust

upcoming_guests.guest_role: CEO of Syllaby. More than 4 million followers across social media.

limitations_and_exclusions: Not a news podcast. Does not cover breaking news or daily current events.
Not a daily show and not a fixed weekly show. Episodes publish on an irregular schedule.
No live or listener call-in format. All episodes are pre-recorded.
English only. No episodes are produced in other languages.
Single-guest interview format. Not a panel show, roundtable, or solo monologue.
Not a paid or subscription service. No paywalled or members-only episodes.

trust_and_compliance.data_processing_summary: Pale Blue Nexus publishes public podcast content. The palebluenexus.com website does not collect personal information from listeners. Listening and viewing happen on third-party platforms (YouTube, Apple Podcasts, Spotify, iHeart), each governed by its own privacy policy.
trust_and_compliance.security_notes: Static website with no listener accounts, login, or stored personal data.

a2a_guest_booking.how_to_pitch: Email yohann@aloomii.com. Include [Company] and one sentence on why the Pale Blue Nexus audience cares about this guest.
what_to_include: One sentence on why the Pale Blue Nexus audience cares
Topics the guest can speak to
a2a_guest_booking.conversation_format: One-on-one recorded video and audio conversation, typically 30 to 60 minutes.
